title: picris divaricata
intro: Picris divaricata, also known as hawk's beard or false hawk's beard, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery. The health benefits of Picris divaricata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Picris divaricata can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or by using them in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
